title: Missing Links
description: A mod adding stairs, slabs, walls, and other variants to blocks mojang would most likely add them too.
body:
## Features:
Missing Links adds all the seemingly missing odds and ends to Minecraft. I noticed after the 1.18 update, a lot of the standardization that came in 1.14 for what stone sets would have was seamingly forgotten in 1.18, so this mod came into being to fix that. Now the mod adds a whole bunch of stairs, slabs, walls, levers, buttons, and pressure plates for all the stone sets in the game.

Spice up your building with all the new slabs, stairs, and walls! Go wild!

This mod only adds ones that are already in the game. No new sets are added, only what feels like Mojang could realistically one day add to the game. This mod is also designed to mostly nurture and foster your creativity, like Mojang attemts to always do when adding new blocks and such to the game.

- Andesite Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- Diorite Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- Granite Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- Cobbled Deepslate Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- Calcite Stairs, Slab, Wall, Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- Tuff Stairs, Slab, Wall, Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- Dripstone Stairs, Slab, Wall, Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- Smooth Basalt Stairs, Slab, Wall, Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- Endstone Stairs, Slab, Wall, Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- Obsidian Stairs, Slab, Wall, Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- Crying Obsidian Stairs, Slab, Wall, Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- Quartz Brick Stairs, Slab, Wall, Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- Terracotta Stairs, Slab, Wall, Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- All 16 Colours of Terracotta Stairs, Slab, Wall, Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- All 16 Colours of Glazed Terracotta Stairs, Slab, Wall, Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- All 16 Colours of Concrete Stairs, Slab, Wall, Button, Pressure Plate, and Lever
- All 16 Colours of Wool Stairs, Slab, and Wall
- Clay Stairs, Slab, and Wall
- Packed Mud Stairs, Slab, and Wall
- Sculk Stairs, Slab, and Wall
- Every Mineral Block Stairs, Slab, and Wall
- Miscellaneous missing walls
